Roboharness: Visual Reports

Auto-generated from CI on every push to main. Each demo runs headless in GitHub Actions and produces visual checkpoint captures.

MuJoCo Grasp

CPU Meshcat 3D

Scripted 2-finger gripper grasping a cube. Multi-view captures at 4 checkpoints with interactive 3D scenes.

MuJoCo inline model · 3 cameras · position control

G1 WBC Reach

Humanoid Diff-IK CPU

Unitree G1 reaching targets with whole-body control. Pinocchio + Pink differential-IK keeps balance while both arms reach 3D targets.

MuJoCo Menagerie · 4 cameras · WbcIkController

G1 Locomotion

Humanoid GR00T RL Walk

G1 stand → walk → stop using GR00T ONNX locomotion policies. Real 29-DOF model from HuggingFace with multi-camera captures.

LeRobot HF model · multi-camera · GrootLocomotionController

G1 Native LeRobot

Humanoid API CPU

Official LeRobot make_env() factory for standardized env creation. DDS-ready for sim-to-real transfer.

LeRobot native · VectorEnvAdapter · DDS-ready

SONIC Motion Tracking

Humanoid MoCap API

NVIDIA GEAR-SONIC encoder+decoder pipeline. Replay motion capture clips on the G1 via latent-space tracking. Planner + tracking modes.

3 ONNX models · 29-DOF · SonicLocomotionController
Generated by Roboharness CI/CD pipeline · Build logs
